Class FishEntry

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.fish.FishEntry
public class FishEntry extends Object
Represents a single type of fish that can be caught. Defines the fish's properties, including its rarity, relative weight in the loot pool, biome restrictions, and physical weight range.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishEntry

      public FishEntry(String id, org.bukkit.Material material, String displayName, String description, Rarity rarity, int weight, List<org.bukkit.block.Biome> biomes, double minWeight, double maxWeight)
      Constructs a new FishEntry.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier for the fish
      material - the item material to use
      displayName - the name displayed to players
      description - the description/lore of the fish
      rarity - the fish rarity
      weight - relative weight in the weighted pool
      biomes - list of biomes where this fish can be caught
      minWeight - minimum catch weight
      maxWeight - maximum catch weight

    • appliesToBiome

      public boolean appliesToBiome(org.bukkit.block.Biome biome)
      Checks if this fish can be caught in the specified biome.
      Parameters:
      biome - the biome to check
      Returns:
      true if catchable in the biome, false otherwise

    • rollWeight

      public double rollWeight(Random random)
      Rolls a random physical weight for the fish based on its min/max range.
      Parameters:
      random - the random source
      Returns:
      the rolled weight
